creator: cristianorolim@hotmail.com
text:
As the PHPLogCon Project was renamed to LogAnalyzer (http://blog.gerhards.net/2010/02/phplogcon-becomes-adiscon-loganalyzer.html), please repocopy  sysutils/phplogcon to sysutils/loganalyzer.

After that, please apply the attached diff file. It will update sysutils/loganalyzer to version 3.0.0.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
